name: LinkedIn MCP Server (via HAPI)
what_it_does: MCP server providing LinkedIn API tools — enabling AI agents to retrieve LinkedIn profile data and publish content. Built via the HAPI MCP framework. Enables professional networking agents to read profiles, post updates, and interact with LinkedIn's professional data platform.
use_cases: Retrieving LinkedIn profiles and professional data from recruiting or sales agents
Publishing content and updates to LinkedIn from marketing automation agents
Building professional networking workflows with AI-assisted outreach
Researching company and professional data for competitive intelligence agents
not_for: Mass scraping or bulk profile harvesting (violates LinkedIn Terms of Service)
Automated connection requests without user consent
best_when: A sales, recruiting, or marketing professional wants AI agents to assist with LinkedIn activities — retrieving profiles, drafting content, or researching prospects — within LinkedIn's API terms.
avoid_when: Automated outreach or scraping at scale. LinkedIn aggressively enforces its Terms of Service and has strict API access policies. Most LinkedIn API capabilities require partner-level access.

auth.notes: LinkedIn OAuth 2.0. Most LinkedIn API capabilities require LinkedIn Partner Program access. Basic profile read and post create available with standard OAuth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: LinkedIn API free for approved apps; partner access required for advanced features
pricing.paid_tiers: LinkedIn Partner Program for advanced API access
pricing.notes: MCP server free open source. LinkedIn API access requires app approval. Many features gated behind LinkedIn Partnership tier.

performance.rate_limits: LinkedIn API: 100 calls/day (basic), higher with partner

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: LinkedIn profile data is personal professional information — handle with care
LinkedIn TOS strictly limits automated scraping and mass outreach — violations lead to account bans
Most useful LinkedIn APIs require partner-level access not available to standard developers
Rate limits are very restrictive (100 calls/day basic) — multi-user agents will exhaust quickly
HAPI framework implementation — validate against current LinkedIn API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Professional profile data. LinkedIn ToS compliance critical — automated mass actions risk account suspension. OAuth with minimal scopes. GDPR for EU member data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Professional PII data. LinkedIn ToS violations risk bans. OAuth required. GDPR for EU. Strict rate limits limit agent utility. Partner access required for most features.
